read: Compares production helper functions on actual MORI-dispatched packed tensors. The global-id path mirrors the current production stage1_saved bridge; the localized-id path tests whether AITER stage1 capture must run in local expert coordinates; the dummy path additionally avoids aliasing nonlocal routes onto expert 0 by appending one zero expert. The stage1_recompute path keeps the normal fast AITER forward contract and rebuilds dummy-local stage1 only inside owner VJP, avoiding long-lived saved-stage1 memory. When include_expert_loop_oracle is enabled, the retained expert_loop owner VJP is also run on the same packed tensors so compact/grouped AITER math can be separated from later training-step NaN or memory effects.
